title: BCreativetolearn Red Cellophane Roll 50cmx4.5m - Perfect for Arts & Crafts, Versatile Floral Décor Cellophane Wrap, 24gsm, Acid-Free
features: Vibrant Red Hue: Add a splash of valentines red to your projects with our 50cm x 4.5m roll, perfect for a variety of decorative uses.
Premium Quality - Our 24gsm cellophane is translucent, durable, and flexible, ideal for both professional and home crafters.
Multi-Use Cellophane - A versatile craft material, wrap flower and bouquets, wrap gifts and hampers. Cut, fold, scrunch & glue onto cards & other homemade arts & crafts.
Acid-Free Material - Safe for use in food presentation, our cellophane adds a decorative touch to your culinary creations without compromising on safety.
Colourfast Reliability - Confidently use our cellophane for vibrant displays that remain consistent in color, even when exposed to moisture.
description: Product Description Large Sheet of Rolled Coloured Cellophane. Large Vibrant Sheet The cellophane comes on a cardboard roll, is vibrant in colour and high quality. Sheets are 50 x 450 cm - a great size for wrapping, making crafts and decorative work. Single Sheet Per Roll This cellophane is easy to unroll & cut to the size you require, so a little can go a long way. Perfect to create themed arts & crafts or baby shower gifts. Translucent Cellophane This cellophane is a translucent red, meaning it is possible to see through the sheet whilst giving the view a red tint. Play with light by placing it in front of light sources to change the colour of the projected light, Colourfast, Acid Free & Water Resistant Acid free suitable for food use, floral arrangements and florist flower bouquets. Colourfast & Water Resistant, the colour of the cellophane wont run or fade when wet. We Stock A Range Of 7 Cellophane Rolls. Product Description Discover the vibrant versatility of our Red cellophane roll, perfect for a wide range of creative endeavors. This high-quality, translucent cellophane offers a burst of colour to any project, from arts and crafts to elegant floral arrangements. Explore the features and possibilities of our red cellophane rolls: Specifications: Dimensions: 50cm width x 4.5m length. Thickness: 24gsm, providing a perfect balance of durability and flexibility. Material: Acid-free, ensuring longevity and preservation of your creations. Food Safety: Appropriate for culinary uses, adding a vivid touch to your food presentations. Colourfast: The vibrant red colour won’t run when wet, ensuring consistent quality in all conditions. Versatile Uses: Arts & Crafts: Ideal for a variety of craft projects, including scrapbooking, gift wrapping, or custom decorations. Floral Arrangements: Adds an elegant touch to bouquets and centerpieces, enhancing the natural beauty of flowers. Light Play: The translucent quality creates captivating light effects, perfect for stage decorations, window displays, and lampshade crafting. The lively red hue of our cellophane roll is perfect for year-round occasions, particularly enhancing: Valentine’s Day: Add a romantic touch to gifts and decorations. Christmas: Create festive and cheerful holiday crafts. Chinese New Year: Complement traditional red themes for luck and prosperity. National Days & Patriotic Events: Ideal for adding a vibrant red to your thematic decorations. Educational and Artistic Events: Great for school projects, art classes, and creative workshops. Whether you're a professional florist, an event planner, a passionate crafter, or someone who loves to add a personal touch to special occasions, our red cellophane roll is an excellent choice for bringing your creative vision to life.
